# Agent Hub

> Multi-agent development system. 175 prompts for autonomous AI agents.

## Models
- Claude Code Opus 4.6 (Anthropic)
- Gemini 3.1 Pro (Google)
- Codex CLI (OpenAI)

## Features
- 175 prompts for different roles and tasks
- 48 team combinations (combos)
- Overnight mode (100+ tasks autonomously)
- Infinite mode (never stops until Ctrl+C)
- 3 languages: Russian, English, Kazakh
- Dark/light theme
- Search, filter, sort, compare
- Export: Markdown, JSON, CSV, HTML
- PWA with offline support
- 12 keyboard shortcuts

## Prompt Categories
- Roles: Frontend, Backend, Fullstack, Tester, Designer, DevOps, Architect, Security, etc.
- Tasks: Overnight (100+ tasks), Features (50+), Testing (100+ tests), Security audit, Refactoring, Performance, A11y, Documentation, Sprint
- Special: Infinite mode (♾️), Mega teams (3-10 agents)

## Links
- Source: /
- Prompts: /#prompts
- Teams: /#combos
- CLI: /#cheat
- Setup: /#setup
